description: DOMParser.parseFromString gated sink: dangerous MIME fires, safe MIME suppressed, payload-arg filtering

expected.notes: document.location flows into parseFromString(input, 'text/html') — DOM XSS
parseFromString with text/xml — safe MIME, must NOT fire (regression guard)
parseFromString with application/xml — safe MIME, must NOT fire (regression guard)
parseFromString with application/xhtml+xml — dangerous MIME, fires
parseFromString with dynamic MIME — conservative, fires
parseFromString with constant payload — dangerous MIME but safe payload, must NOT fire (regression guard)
